name: claude-code-ultimate-guide
description: A tremendous feat of documentation, this guide covers Claude Code from beginner to power user, with production-ready templates for Claude Code features, guides on agentic workflows, and a lot of great learning materials, including quizzes and a handy "cheatsheet". Whether it's the "ultimate" guide to Claude Code will be up to the reader :)
readme:
# FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide

A tremendous feat of documentation, this guide covers Claude Code from beginner to power user, with production-ready templates for Claude Code features, guides on agentic workflows, and a lot of great learning materials, including quizzes and a handy "cheatsheet". Whether it's the "ultimate" guide to Claude Code will be up to the reader :)
readmeHtml:
FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide

A tremendous feat of documentation, this guide covers Claude Code from beginner to power user, with production-ready templates for Claude Code features, guides on agentic workflows, and a lot of great learning materials, including quizzes and a handy "cheatsheet". Whether it's the "ultimate" guide to Claude Code will be up to the reader :)
